baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Update the CI workflow after changing the repo's verify command.
evals.expected_output: A CI-safe update that keeps local scripts, workflow commands, and contributor documentation aligned.
assertions: Inspects existing workflows and package or Makefile scripts.
Keeps CI and local verification commands consistent.
Runs the relevant local quality gate or explains why it cannot run.
